ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agency's mandate */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the agency was established */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Agency website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding allocation record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding agency */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the funding allocation */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated in that year */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the allocation was made */,
  "allocation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocation_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding trend record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding agency */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the observed trend */,
  "trend_start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the trend */,
  "trend_end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_trends_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding allocation associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_reports_allocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("allocation_id") REFERENCES funding_allocation ("allocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding allocation being changed */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old funding amount */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New funding amount */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person making the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_allocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("allocation_id") REFERENCES funding_allocation ("allocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the category entails */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_category_allocations" (
  "category_allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category allocation record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding agency */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding category */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the category allocation */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated to the category in that year */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the allocation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_category_allocations_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_category_allocations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES funding_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source or agency */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of funding source (e.g., government, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_allocations" (
  "source_allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source allocation record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding source */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding agency */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the allocation */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated from the source to the agency in that year */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the allocation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_allocations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_allocations_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research outcome record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding agency */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Research area (e.g., health, environment) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the research outcome */,
  "impact_score" REAL /* Impact score of the research outcome (e.g., citation count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)
